utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 of these items, each with full details. 'property' has full specifications (type, price, location, size, accessibility features, condo fees, utilities, move-in date). 'financing' specifies type, source, and advisor. 'legal_services' includes provider, cost, currency, and scope. 'moving_services' includes provider, cost, currency, and features. 'setup_services' includes provider, cost, currency, and services. 'total_budget' includes property purchase, legal fees, moving and setup costs, total estimated cost, and currency. All items are present and fully detailed.
